name: Balance the Cosmic Budget
text:
Each player chooses a number of permanents they control equal to the fewest controlled by any one player; each player sacrifices the rest. The reckoning audits everyone down to the same line item.
Then the player who lost the most permanents this way puts a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each one. The deficit must be paid somewhere.
flavorText: "The books are balanced. There are no books. There is no anything. We balanced it."
